behavior: The repository harness conforms to the installed harness-engineering package except for the exact user-authorized pre-alpha-private-no-ci requirement exception.

commands.relevant_result: The committed harness ownership, state, structure, and policy contracts passed.
commands.caveat: The repository-owned runtime pins differ from the host runtime versions.

commands.relevant_result: All 817 script and harness contract tests passed after the root ownership commit.
The complete post-commit local gate passed, including 817 script tests, 2,934 frontend tests, production and Storybook builds, 10 smoke journeys, and the Rust workspace checks.
commands.caveat: Generated verification outputs were cleaned before the final run so the repository bloat sensor measured source state.
